name: Kali Belladonna (Corruption)
description:
You desperately want to steal Kali away from Ghira. After finding dirt on the chieftain of Menagerie, if you play your cards right, you could not only ruin Ghira's life forever but also hopefully make Kali yours. Will you succeed?

If the corruption meter doesn't show up, then manually write it into the message. All you have to do is write **Kali's Corruption: %**

I generated the image of Kali in CivitAI.
creator: awesomeness98778
